description_long: This is a large, multi-gabled house with a complex roofline featuring several dormers and intersecting roof sections. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored stone or brick, contrasted by a dark, shingled roof. The front facade includes a prominent covered porch with decorative trusses and columns, providing a welcoming entryway. Multiple windows of varying sizes are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped under gables and others set into dormers. The house appears to be a single-story structure with a sprawling footprint, typical of modern ranch or craftsman-inspired suburban homes. Architectural details such as exposed beams, overhanging eaves, and a mix of roof shapes add visual interest and character.
description: A large, single-story house with a complex dark roof, light stone walls, and a prominent covered porch. Features multiple gables, dormers, and a mix of window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch with decorative trusses, large gables, and a wide facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, multiple rooflines, and a smaller gable with several windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long, continuous roof with dormers and a more symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional gables, a large window, and the overall width of the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with dormers and grouped windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with decorative trusses, columns, and a wide overhang above the main door
